problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
